prBody:
Ports upstream gsd-pi fix [sha=e723617]: extension `pi.sendMessage` now returns `Promise<void>` so callers can await turn delivery, closing a race where the delivery promise was dropped.

## Changes
- `ExtensionAPI` / `ExtensionActions` `sendMessage` typed to return `Promise<void>` (`extensions/types.ts`)
- `loader.ts` returns the awaitable `triggerTurn` delivery promise
- `agent-session.ts` `AgentSession.bindCore` binding fixed to return the catch-chain (otto-inlined equivalent of the upstream `agent-session-extensions.ts` hunk the guidance flagged as having "no otto file" â€” the binding lives inline here, and without this the Promise was dropped, re-introducing the race)
- `hooks-runner.test.ts` stub made `async` for `ExtensionRuntime` signature conformance

## Gates (all green)
- Regression test `loader.send-message.test.ts` â€” fails pre-fix, passes post-fix (pins Promise-return shape + await-after-delivery ordering)
- Build: pass
- Targeted suite: pass
- Full suite (`npm test` + `verify:pr`): pass
- Independent reviewer: approve (manual-port faithful; extra scope justified, not creep)

Closes #111
